name: Jibannet Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Jibannet Holdings Co., Ltd. operates in residential land compensation industry in Japan. The company is involved in ground survey and analysis, countermeasure proposal, and issue of quality certificates; and development of ground and home know-how, and technology in earthquake power. It also engages in reinsurance business. The company was formerly known as Jibannet Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Jibannet Holdings Co., Ltd. in October 2014. Jibannet Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 2008 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
